Class ControllerRequests

java.lang.Object
guiRequests.ControllerRequests
public class ControllerRequests extends Object

Title: ControllerRequests Class

Description: This ControllerRequests class represents the link between ViewRequests, PostManager, and Database.

Copyright: Noah Cilliers © 2026

Author:
Noah Cillers

      Description: Public method called whenever the post button is clicked, input validation included

      Title: deletePost Method.

      Description: Public method sends the post to database to be modified
